response.justification: The candidate substantially exceeds the 6+ years requirement with nearly two decades of full-stack experience, strong recent TypeScript/Node.js/React/MongoDB work, hands-on AI-agent and MCP tooling experience at re:cinq, and demonstrated cloud/containerization skills (AWS CDK, Docker, Kubernetes). A testing-first craftsmanship background (TDD, test-runner and assertion-library authorship) aligns well with the quality expectations. Gaps are mostly stack-specific: no explicit Nest.js, Vitest/Playwright, or recent Kotlin/Java production work, but the breadth of languages and proven adaptability make these low-risk.
strengths: 18+ years full-stack experience with recent TypeScript, Node.js, React, and MongoDB in production
Direct AI-agent development experience, including MCP code generators and agentic workflow frameworks
Strong testing and craftsmanship culture: TDD, CI/CD, authored test frameworks, ran workshops and courses
concerns: No explicit Nest.js experience, the primary backend framework in the stack
Kotlin/Java exposure is dated (2016-2018) and Python is not listed among skills
No stated experience with Vitest, Jest, or Playwright specifically, despite strong general testing background

key_factors.factor: AI agent and MCP development experience
Missing Nest.js and required testing-framework specifics
